name_en: 【💯Five Grid New Sun God White】Lᴀᴅʏ Embroidered Diana Bag. The "Cʜʀɪsᴛɪᴀɴ Dɪᴏʀ" logo is stylish and feminine. Adorned with the iconic "D.I.O.R." charm, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Equipped with a large detachable double-sided embroidered shoulder strap, allowing you to choose your carrying style freely. Detachable double-sided embroidered wide strap, internal zip pocket and patch pocket. Can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, easily paired with other embroidered straps.
name_cn:
【💯Five Grid New Sun God White】Lᴀᴅʏ Embroidered Diana Bag. The "Cʜʀɪsᴛɪᴀɴ Dɪᴏʀ" logo is stylish and feminine. Adorned with the iconic "D.I.O.R." charm, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Equipped with a large detachable double-sided embroidered shoulder strap, allowing you to choose your carrying style freely. Detachable double-sided embroidered wide strap, internal zip pocket and patch pocket. Can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, easily paired with other embroidered straps.
Size: 24 cm x 20 cm x 11 cm
